label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Partnership as it appears on the records of the Secretary of State)
rationale: LLP name as it appears on the SOS record. Must match record exactly so SOS can identify the entity whose registered-agent slot is being vacated.

label_verbatim: FIRST: (name of current noncommercial registered agent)
rationale: Name of the noncommercial registered agent of record (i.e., the resigning party / filer). Reuses the registered_agent.* namespace per MBCA-3A-NCRA / MBCA-12E-NCRA / MLLC-3A-NCRA precedent — the resignation context is implicit from form_id and form_name; no separate 'resigning_agent.*' namespace needed. (Drafter initially proposed resigning_agent.name; corrected during review.)

label_verbatim: (physical street address, city, state and zip code – as it appears on the record)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the noncommercial registered agent of record. Form explicitly says 'as it appears on the record' — value must match SOS record verbatim, not the agent's current preferred address.

label_verbatim: SECOND: (insert name) — person at the LLP to receive notice
rationale: Name of the natural person at the LLP to whom the agent will deliver the §111-required notice of resignation (mandatory predicate for the resignation to take effect 31 days later). Reuses MBCA-12E-NCRA's resignation_notice.* namespace rather than coining notification_recipient.*.

label_verbatim: (mailing address including zip code) — for §111 notice
rationale: Mailing address (single line incl. ZIP) where the §111 notice of resignation will be sent.

Title of the person at the LLP receiving the §111 notice. Form caption is the permissive variant '(title of person notified)' — same as MLLC-3A-NCRA — because LLPs name partners (general partner / managing partner) rather than corporate officers; not restricted to corporate-officer titles like the MBCA-3A-NCRA / MBCA-12E-NCRA variant.
Date the statement of resignation is signed; resignation takes effect 31 days after this filing is delivered to the LLP.

label_verbatim: (type or print name) — below the (signature of noncommercial registered agent) caption
rationale: Signer printed name. Single widget, no separate title field on this form; matches Shape B of filing-signer-shape (name only) per MBCA-3A-NCRA / MLLC-3A-NCRA precedent. The signer is by definition the resigning noncommercial RA whose name was already entered at Text3; redundant by design (form acts as both attestation and signature).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite enum value 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite enum value '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite enum value 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($35 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email (applies to the LLP; resignation does not affect the LLP's annual-report obligations — only the agent slot).
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
